meaning: n.职业赛马骑师,(机器的)操作员
examples: The jockey took a nasty tumble at the third fence.
Bob Champion was a young jockey with a bright future.
Eight months later, he returned to his job as a jockey.
"First and foremost I'm a jockey and that's what I do best, " he says.
The Killarney-born jockey moved to England as an 18-year-old after riding point-to-point in Ireland.
